emails.subject: Union Gas - Doehrman #1
emails.body: Union Gas Doehrman #1 Tom, The Doehrman #1 well came on line for first delivery on Monday, 2/7/00 at 11:45am. The contract calls for intra-month pricing for deliveries that commence after the first day of the month. Please create a one month baseload firm deal ticket for the remaining days of the month based on the following information: Counterparty Meter Volume Price Union Gas Operating Company 9825 500mmbtu/d 100% Gas Daily less $0.10 Susan will create a committed reserves firm ticket for the remaining term of the deal once our geologists have gathered enough data to forecast the reserves of this well; at such time, we will request that this ticket be zeroed out. If you have any questions or concerns, please give me a call. Thanks, vlt x3-6353
